message:
test(io): lock save/load edge cases across dtypes and exotic floats

Added 9 round-trip tests that exercise the np.save / np.load contract
at boundary conditions:
- scalar 0-d (shape=[]) round-trip
- empty 1-D (shape=[0]) and empty 2-D (shape=[3,0]) round-trip
- 4-D (2x3x4x5) shape preservation
- NaN, ±Inf, and -0.0 bit-exact preservation
- i32, u8, Bool dtype round-trips
- f32 dtype round-trip within 1-ULP tolerance

Catches silent header-encoding regressions (empty dim schemas,
scalar shape=[]) and IEEE-754 bit-loss in f64 payload encoding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
